title: Title Fixer
description: Simple client side mod that makes titles displayed on-screen always fit inside the screen space.
body: Looking for a Minecraft server? Purchasing through the link below directly supports me! # Minecraft Title Fixer Makes the Minecraft title fit the screen at all times. ## Dependencies - [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) - [Auto Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/auto-config-updated-api) (only for 1.16.5) - [Mod Menu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) (optional, required to change settings in-game) ## Features - Can be toggled on and off - Allows setting custom title margins - Has multiple options for dealing with the scoreboard ## Previews Before ![sample0_0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheGameratorT/McTitleFixer/main/src-img/sample0_0.jpg) After ![sample0_1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheGameratorT/McTitleFixer/main/src-img/sample0_1.jpg) **Title Fixer is a mod for Fabric, and there are no plans to port this mod to Forge.**
